title: Price Drop Tracker
description: A full-stack MEVN application that monitors product prices across multiple e-commerce stores. Users register products with a target price and receive email alerts when prices drop to their threshold, with a dashboard visualizing price history over time.

title: Dead Link Archaeologist
description: A web tool that scans any submitted URL for broken links, queries the Wayback Machine CDX API to recover archived snapshots of dead pages, and returns a real-time report of every link's status with direct archive replacements.

title: E-commerce API Docs
description: Dynamic E-Commerce Workflow Management with order processing, real-time inventory updates, and secure user authentication. Documented publicly via Postman.

title: Course Booking API Docs
description: RESTful API for managing course enrollments with user registration, authentication, course creation, updates, archiving, and student enrollment. Documented via Postman.

title: Course Booking App
description: A MERN-stack course enrollment system with user registration, authentication, profile management, and seamless course browsing and enrollment.

title: E-commerce App
description: MERN E-Commerce Platform with dynamic product catalog, real-time search, seamless cart, secure checkout, and a comprehensive admin dashboard with analytics.

title: Airline Booking Mockup
description: Side Project: Conceptual UI design for flight search, seat selection, and booking confirmation — focused on user experience and workflow efficiency.

title: Airline Booking Prototype
description: Side Project: Interactive prototype simulating end-to-end airline booking, including flight search, reservation, payment processing, and real-time ticket management.
